name: Alchemix - Match 3
author: Poki
description: Alchemix - Match 3 is a magical merge game where you assist the wizard Alchemix in creating a powerful elixir! The adventure begins when Alchemix’s mischievous cat scatters all the magical items, and it’s up to you to help the wizard gather them back. Match three or more crystals in a row to clear them from the board. As you progress through the levels, you’ll collect more and more enchanted items for your potion. Are you ready to dive into this mystical adventure and help Alchemix create magic? How to play Alchemix - Match 3? Click to swap tiles and match three in a row! Who created Alchemix - Match 3? Alchemix - Match 3 is created by Anima Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Alchemix - Match 3 for free? You can play Alchemix - Match 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Alchemix - Match 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Alchemix - Match 3 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
